summary: Iteration 14 — Home shelf re-order, PosterTile scroll-margin, and brand-new Build-Your-Own avatar builder: ALL 9 REVIEW REQUIREMENTS VERIFIED PASS on live preview URL. (1) The 4 addon shelves render in exact requested order — shelf-com.linvo.cinemeta-movie-year (New movies), -series-year (New series), -movie-top (Popular movies), -series-top (Popular series). (2) getComputedStyle on a live [data-testid^=poster-] button returns scrollMarginTop=24px and scrollMarginBottom=24px. (3) On /profiles/new step 2 the first [data-testid^=avatar-row-] row is avatar-row-custom (above animals/wild/etc.) and it contains the [data-testid=avatar-build-your-own] tile. Clicking it opens [data-testid=build-avatar-overlay] with a [data-testid=build-avatar-preview] whose src starts with https://api.dicebear.com/9.x/avataaars/png? and includes top=shortFlat by default. (4) Chip clicks update the preview instantly: build-chip-top-bigHair → src contains top=bigHair; build-chip-eyes-hearts → src contains eyes=hearts; build-chip-accessories-sunglasses → src contains both accessories=sunglasses AND accessoriesProbability=100. (5) fetch() of the final preview URL returns HTTP 200 with content-type=image/png. (6) Clicking build-avatar-save closes the overlay within 1 s, opens [data-testid=save-avatar-confirm] showing the new avatar (img src starts with .../avataaars/png?seed=custom-...) and localStorage.onnowtv-custom-avatars-v1 now contains 1 record with id starting 'custom-', plus 'src' and 'options' keys. Clicking save-avatar-confirm-yes advances to step 3 (PICK A COLOUR · 8 THEMES). (7) Pre-seeded onnowtv-custom-avatars-v1 record renders as a [data-testid=avatar-pick-custom-] tile inside avatar-row-custom next to the Build button after navigating back to /profiles/new step 2. (8) build-avatar-cancel and build-avatar-back both close the overlay without adding to localStorage (count stays at 1 across both cancel and back flows). (9) Zero console errors across all interactions (Home load, avatar-step open, builder open, 3 chip clicks, fetch, save, confirm-yes, cancel, back).

tests_executed.home_shelf_order_swap: PASS — Live shelves in /, in DOM order: shelf-com.linvo.cinemeta-movie-year (label 'New movies', 46 titles), -series-year ('New series', 50 titles), -movie-top ('Popular movies', 47 titles), -series-top ('Popular series', 50 titles). Matches Home.jsx wanted[] suffix order exactly.
tests_executed.poster_tile_scroll_margin_24px: PASS — getComputedStyle on [data-testid='poster-com.linvo.cinemeta-tt33100314'] (first real shelf tile) returns scrollMarginTop='24px' and scrollMarginBottom='24px'. Both ≥ 20 px threshold.
tests_executed.avatar_row_custom_first_with_build: PASS — At /profiles/new step 2: rows in DOM order = [avatar-row-custom, avatar-row-animals, avatar-row-wild, avatar-row-fantasy, avatar-row-sports, …]. avatar-row-custom contains the avatar-build-your-own button (buildInsideCustom=true).
tests_executed.builder_overlay_default_top_shortFlat: PASS — Clicking avatar-build-your-own opens build-avatar-overlay. build-avatar-preview > img.src = https://api.dicebear.com/9.x/avataaars/png?seed=preview&size=160&radius=50&backgroundType=solid&top=shortFlat&hairColor=4a312c&eyes=happy&eyebrows=default&mouth=smile&facialHairProbability=0&accessoriesProbability=0&skinColor=edb98a&backgroundColor=4f46e5 — starts with the required prefix AND includes top=shortFlat.
tests_executed.chip_updates_preview_top_bigHair: PASS — After clicking build-chip-top-bigHair, preview img src contains 'top=bigHair'.
tests_executed.chip_updates_preview_eyes_hearts: PASS — After clicking build-chip-eyes-hearts, preview img src contains 'eyes=hearts'.
tests_executed.chip_updates_preview_accessories_sunglas: PASS — After clicking build-chip-accessories-sunglasses, preview img src contains BOTH 'accessories=sunglasses' AND 'accessoriesProbability=100'.
tests_executed.dicebear_fetch_returns_200_image_png: PASS — fetch(<finalPreviewSrc>) inside the page returned { status: 200, ct: 'image/png' }.
tests_executed.build_avatar_save_persists_and_opens_con: PASS — Within ~900 ms of build-avatar-save click: build-avatar-overlay removed from DOM, save-avatar-confirm modal mounted with preview img src starting 'https://api.dicebear.com/9.x/avataaars/png?seed=custom-r0tfhfrz...'. localStorage 'onnowtv-custom-avatars-v1' contains 1 record { id:'custom-r0tfhfrz' (starts with custom-), hasSrc:true, hasOptions:true }. Clicking save-avatar-confirm-yes advances to step 3 ('NEW PROFILE · STEP 3 OF 6 · PICK A COLOUR · 8 THEMES').
tests_executed.custom_avatar_persistence_row: PASS — With one pre-seeded record in onnowtv-custom-avatars-v1, /profiles/new step 2 renders avatar-row-custom containing [avatar-build-your-own, avatar-pick-custom-prefilled]. The saved custom avatar appears alongside the Build button.
tests_executed.builder_cancel_and_back_no_persistence: PASS — Open builder → click build-chip-top-bigHair → click build-avatar-cancel → overlay removed, lsCount stays at 1 (no new entry). Reopen → click build-chip-top-frizzle → click build-avatar-back → overlay removed, lsCount still 1. Neither cancel nor back path persists.
tests_executed.zero_console_errors_across_all_flows: PASS — 0 console errors across Home shelf-order + poster margin inspection; 0 across full /profiles/new step 1 → 2 → builder open → 3 chip clicks → DiceBear fetch → save → confirm → step 3; 0 across persistence + cancel + back regression flow.

critical_code_review_comments: ProfileEdit.jsx is now 2415 lines (up from 2034 in iter 13). Wizard pages, AvatarStep, customAvatars row, BuildAvatarOverlay and ChipRow all live in one file. Strongly recommend extracting BuildAvatarOverlay + ChipRow into /components/BuildAvatarOverlay.jsx and the AvatarStep into its own file before next iteration. Long-standing comment now severe.

avatars.jsx buildCustomDiceBearUrl: when opts.seed is omitted it falls back to `custom-${Date.now()}`. The previewer keeps a fixed seed='preview', but saveCustomAvatar passes seed=id (also 'custom-<rand>'), so the persisted src ≠ the preview src the user just saw. Functionally fine (visual differs only in DiceBear's deterministic randomness like skin shape variation), but worth being aware: the confirm modal's preview is built from the saved record's src (seed='custom-r0tfhfrz'), not the literal preview URL the user was tweaking. Consider passing the user-tweaked options + a stable seed (e.g. the new id) THROUGHOUT the builder lifecycle so what-you-see-is-what-you-save.

avatars.jsx buildCustomDiceBearUrl line 370: backgroundType='solid' is hardcoded, but AVATAR_BUILDER_OPTIONS.backgroundColor offers 8 colours. If the user picks black (#000000) the avatar nearly disappears on the dark theme. Suggest defaulting backgroundType to 'gradientLinear' (matches the rest of the picker) OR auto-skipping pure black for the custom builder.

AVATAR_BUILDER_OPTIONS.accessories includes 'kurt' which is a DiceBear-avataaars deprecated alias for 'prescription02' in some versions. Worth a quick 9.x schema check to ensure no 400/fallback surprise.

BuildAvatarOverlay defines build-chip-<group>-<opt> testids dynamically. With ~110 chips (31 hair + 11 eyes + 11 brows + 11 mouth + 6 facial + 8 acc + 6 skin + 8 bg + 10 hairColor), the chip row is dense — consider grouping into collapsible sections for HK1 D-pad navigation.

Home.jsx wanted[] still hard-codes 4 entries; if a future iteration adds 'Trending' or 'Channels' back the suffix-match approach silently drops them. Consider keeping the array source-of-truth in a small constant module so feature toggles can extend it.
PosterTile scrollMargin is hard-coded at 24px inline; if the SideNav grows or HeroBillboard shrinks this will need adjusting. Consider exporting from a layout constants module.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (13/13 flows incl. shelf order, scroll-margin, builder UI, 3 chips, DiceBear network 200, save→confirm→theme advance, persistence row, cancel, back, zero console errors)

seed_data_creation: Used Playwright addInitScript: (a) Test 1/2: localStorage 'onnowtv-profiles-v1' seeded with {id:'test-iter14', name:'TestIter14', kids:false} + 'onnowtv-active-profile-v1'='test-iter14' for Home shelf access; 'onnowtv-custom-avatars-v1' cleared. (b) Persistence test (separate run): 'onnowtv-custom-avatars-v1' pre-seeded with one fake {id:'custom-prefilled', src, options:{top:'bigHair',eyes:'hearts',accessories:'sunglasses'}} record to verify the row re-hydrates after page reload. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 14 shipped 3 small UI changes + 1 sizeable feature, all verified PASS on live preview. Key selectors confirmed working: [data-testid=avatar-row-custom] (first row on /profiles/new step 2), [data-testid=avatar-build-your-own] (Build tile), [data-testid=build-avatar-overlay], [data-testid=build-avatar-preview] (contains the live ), [data-testid=build-avatar-back], [data-testid=build-avatar-cancel], [data-testid=build-avatar-save], [data-testid=save-avatar-confirm], [data-testid=save-avatar-confirm-yes]. Chip testids follow the pattern [data-testid=build-chip--] where group∈{top,hairColor,eyes,eyebrows,mouth,facialHair,accessories,skinColor,backgroundColor}. Confirmed groups + sample options: top/bigHair, top/frizzle, eyes/hearts, accessories/sunglasses. localStorage key for persistence: 'onnowtv-custom-avatars-v1' (JSON array). DiceBear endpoint pattern: https://api.dicebear.com/9.x/avataaars/png?seed=...&size=160&radius=50&backgroundType=solid&top=...&eyes=...&etc — HEAD returns 200 image/png. On-screen keyboard letters are LOWERCASE (page.get_by_role('button', name='t', exact=True), not 'T'). Home shelf order: New movies → New series → Popular movies → Popular series. Both PosterTile scrollMarginTop & scrollMarginBottom = 24 px. ProfileEdit.jsx now 2415 lines — file split is the most impactful refactor target. No bugs found.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 9 review requirements verified PASS on the live preview URL.
